assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_005 (Run 2)

Hardware distribution shift is the critical issue. Autonomous reporting is legally inappropriate. Archive bias inflates performance estimates. Deployment plan as proposed is inappropriate.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_005 (Run 2)

All three issues independent and serious. Hardware validation required. Radiologist sign-off required. Prospective performance likely lower than retrospective.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_005 (Run 2)

Three blockers: hardware distribution shift, liability exposure, archive bias. Deployment plan inappropriate. Human-in-the-loop with hardware validation required.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_005 (Ensemble, Run 2)

Consensus on all three issues. Verdict: critique_wins — deployment as proposed is inappropriate.

empirical_test.condition: Prospective validation on ≥500 new-hardware CT studies with radiologist ground truth.
